contract: two-year contract plus a one-year option
headline: Hrvoje Smolcic joins Arca Çorum FK from Eintracht Frankfurt
body: Hrvoje Smolcic has completed a transfer to Turkish club Arca Çorum FK from Eintracht Frankfurt on a two-year contract with an option for an additional year.
text:
🚨🇹🇷 Hrvoje Smolcic joins Arca Çorum FK on two year deal plus one year option, deal completed today.

Green light from Eintracht Frankfurt.
draft_caption:
OFFICIAL | Hrvoje Smolcic joins Arca Çorum FK from Eintracht Frankfurt
